title: Math Handout Example
subtitle: Print-friendly learning sheet with exercises and answers.

sections.heading: Math Handout in use
sections.body: This handout is print-friendly: definitions, worked examples, practice, and an answer key all fit into a structured learning sheet.

cards.title: Objective
cards.body: Find slope from two points and interpret it as rate of change.

sections.heading: Student note
sections.body: Slope is change in y divided by change in x. Keep the point order consistent in numerator and denominator.
